taskVersion.name: find_reversed_word_single

parts.text:
Below is a jumbled sequence of 50 random alphanumeric strings. Within this data, there is one English word spelled backwards.

Data Block: [bpSxU, yceeU3k, 129K8DZf, NOHTYP, fwmpeJ, 6KowB, DmnOcgE, CGEZnQJ, fw4kt, iuit3Bq, CeVAOufT, YNrbJ, 1qp9Ms, LoemT, Wpe05p, ciyc6tMV, VGssm, Gt1aYR, Um2Dkc, 0MkDR, iLExb, qiF0xhb, ISVXMBE1, qwS0yfz, uEbPy1, jmeu1YC, waT4n0k, eO7SsH0d, XEZIXki, 8Xnzf8cj, ujTD5At5, miF7H, jUPyq, uSbcuT7V, sxU8DGBT, aUTj7xC, 5cEWHiA, Mp2iEQN, IrcDx1H, pjJnCC, lTmMwb, sFraKhR, NDS2t, lVNVUF0, ReRF7VY, ArZSB, xgnPuBod, Js68a, 7fs9kCua, rcwiae]

Task: Find the English word hidden in the sequence, reverse it to its original spelling, and output only that word.
